data.title: Wolf Haldenstein Adler Freeman & Herz LLP is investigating potential securities fraud claims on behalf of the shareholders of Driven Brands Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: DRVN)
data.description: On March 5, 2026, Wolf Haldenstein Adler Freeman & Herz LLP announced an investigation into potential claims by investors of Driven Brands Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: DRVN). The investigation focuses on determining if Driven, along with specific officers, engaged in any misconduct. This news suggests possible financial implications for the company and its stakeholders.

data.title: Motiv8AI Featured in FinTech Futures for Introducing a Human-Centered Approach to AI in Banking
data.description: On March 5, 2026, in Ramat Gan, Israel, Motiv8AI, a behavioral intelligence firm specializing in integrating psychology into digital financial services, was highlighted in FinTech Futures. The company is recognized for its efforts to bring back human empathy in contemporary banking through AI.

data.title: Herc Holdings Inc. to Participate in the 2026 J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference
data.description: In Bonita Springs, Florida, Herc Holdings Inc. (NYSE: HRI), a prominent equipment rental provider in North America under Herc Rentals Inc., shared that President Aaron Birnbaum and Senior VP/Chief Financial Officer Mark Humphrey are set to take part in the 2026 J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference in Washington, D.C. on March 17, 2026. The event will involve a fireside chat and a live audio webcast.

data.title: Florida’s Finest Customs to Attend Mid-America Trucking Show 2026 in Louisville
data.description: A company specializing in truck accessories, Florida’s Finest Customs, will be present at the Mid-America Trucking Show (MATS) from March 26-28, 2026, at the Kentucky Exposition Center in Louisville, Ken. This event serves as a prime platform to engage with professionals in the trucking sector nationwide. Florida’s Finest Customs will engage with drivers and industry experts during the three-day show to explore interior enhancements and other offerings.

data.title: Lio Raises $30M Series A to Bring Agentic AI to Enterprise Procurement
data.description: A company supported by Andreessen Horowitz is transforming procurement with a virtual workforce that handles purchasing from start to finish. Based in New York, Lio (formerly askLio) is developing an AI platform tailored for enterprise procurement. The announcement was made on March 5, 2026.

data.title: Quantum Computing Inc. Completes Acquisition of NuCrypt to Advance Quantum Communications Commercialization
data.description: In Hoboken, New Jersey on March 5, 2026, Quantum Computing Inc. (QCi) finalized its acquisition of NuCrypt, LLC. QCi, listed on Nasdaq as QUBT, is a pioneering quantum optics and integrated photonics technology firm. This transaction marks a significant milestone for QCi in the realm of quantum communications.

data.title: MDJM LTD Highlights Digital Animation Museum as a Potential Growth Initiative and Cultural Development Focus
data.description: In London on March 5, 2026, MDJM LTD (Nasdaq: UOKA) shared its plan to advance its digital animation museum platform as a key growth project and cultural enrichment effort. The Company is focusing on this initiative as part of its strategic development goals.

data.title: BTM INDUSTRIAL APPOINTS ROBERT LANCOUR CFO
data.description: An experienced individual in accounting and business administration has recently joined the leadership team of BTM Industrial, a prominent asset disposition company based in Muskegon, Michigan. Robert Lancour has been appointed as the Chief Financial Officer in this strategic move. This addition aims to enhance the executive team and bring valuable expertise to the company. The development was announced on March 5, 2026, with the goal of further solidifying BTM Industrial's position in the market.

data.title: Bloomberg 500 (B500) Index Adds Eleven Securities Following March Reconstitution
data.description: On March 5, 2026, Bloomberg Indices disclosed updates to the Bloomberg 500 (B500) Index scheduled to take effect on March 12, 2026, before the trading session begins. The B500 Index comprises the top 500 performing companies.

data.title: XTI Aerospace/Drone Nerds Support United States Armed Forces
data.description: On March 5, 2026, in Englewood, Colorado, XTI Aerospace, Inc. (Nasdaq: XTIA) announced its position as a leading aerospace and advanced drone technology platform. XTI Aerospace is also the parent company of Drone Nerds, LLC, a major distributor of drones in the United States.

data.title: SIRIUSXM ANNOUNCES EXPIRATION AND RESULTS OF CASH TENDER OFFER FOR ANY AND ALL OUTSTANDING 3.125% SENIOR NOTES DUE 2026
data.description: Sirius XM Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: SIRI) revealed today the launch of a cash tender offer by its subsidiary, Sirius XM Radio LLC, on February 26, 2026. The Offer aims to acquire all outstanding shares of the Offeror's stock. This development was disclosed without specifying the source.

data.title: Primech Holdings Secures Approximately US$33 Million in Multi-Year Institutional Contracts, Expanding Recurring Revenue and Robotics Deployment
data.description: Primech Holdings, symbol PMEC, has successfully obtained contracts totaling approximately US$33 million from 4-year universities in Singapore. As part of these agreements, the company will be implementing 45 HYTRON robots with the aim of enhancing automation processes and generating consistent revenue over the next four years.

data.title: Festi hf.: Results of the Annual General Meeting 5 March 2026
data.description: Today, Festi hf. conducted its Annual General Meeting on Thursday, 5 March 2026. The meeting outcomes are as follows: all necessary resolutions were passed, including the approval of the financial statements and the appointment of new board members. Key figures from the meeting show a high level of shareholder participation with a significant majority in favor of all proposals presented. This demonstrates strong confidence in the company's direction and leadership.
